broadcast.schedule.description: Broadcast schedule (who shows what, when, where).
broadcast.schedule.label: Schedule

content.video.description: Editorial video content (highlights, replays, press conferences).
content.video.label: Video

prediction.market_detail.label: Market detail
prediction.market_detail.description: One prediction market's full detail — question, rules, quotes, volume, expiry.

prediction.market_prices.label: Market quotes
prediction.market_prices.description: Order book / best bid-ask quotes for one prediction market.

prediction.markets_list.label: Prediction markets
prediction.markets_list.description: Catalogue of prediction markets (binary/event contracts) with current quotes.

prediction.price_history.label: Price history
prediction.price_history.description: Historical price series for one prediction market.

prediction.trades.label: Market trades
prediction.trades.description: Recent public trades on a prediction market.

racing.futures.description: Long-running futures markets (Cup outrights, season-long props).
racing.futures.label: Racing futures (Cup outrights)

racing.meetings_by_date.description: List all race meetings (track + races) for a given date.
racing.meetings_by_date.label: Race meetings by day

racing.next_to_jump.description: Next races about to start, sorted by start time.
racing.next_to_jump.label: Next races to jump

racing.race_card.description: Full racecard for one race: runners, prices, jockeys, scratchings.
racing.race_card.label: Race cards & runners

racing.race_results.description: Final placings + dividends for a resulted race.
racing.race_results.label: Race results & dividends

racing.same_race_multi.description: Same Race Multi (SRM) suggestions or popular combinations.
racing.same_race_multi.label: Same race multi

ref.players.description: Player catalogue (id, name, dob, draft info).
ref.players.label: Player profiles

social.post_detail.label: Post detail
social.post_detail.description: One or more social posts by id, with engagement metrics.

social.post_search.label: Post search
social.post_search.description: Search public social posts by query (teams, players, breaking news).

social.user_profile.label: Social profile
social.user_profile.description: A social account's public profile and follower metrics.

social.user_timeline.label: User timeline
social.user_timeline.description: A social account's recent posts (club news, insider feeds).

sport.commentary.description: Text or play-by-play commentary for a match.
sport.commentary.label: Commentary

sport.competition_screen.description: Competition page: leagues, events, optional futures.
sport.competition_screen.label: Competition screen

sport.depth_chart.description: Team depth chart (positional ordering of the roster).
sport.depth_chart.label: Depth chart

sport.draft.description: Draft results / picks for a given season.
sport.draft.label: Draft

sport.event_markets.description: All markets + selections + prices for one event.
sport.event_markets.label: Every market for a match

sport.example.description: Placeholder capability for the template spec and tests; not a real question.
sport.example.label: Example

sport.fixtures_by_date.description: All scheduled fixtures / games on a given date across one league.
sport.fixtures_by_date.label: Fixtures & schedules

sport.injuries.description: Injury report / inactive list for a team or league.
sport.injuries.label: Injuries

sport.match_boxscore.description: Detailed game box score (quarter/period scores, team totals, leaders).
sport.match_boxscore.label: Match box scores

sport.match_detail.description: Single sport event/match including teams, venue, start time.
sport.match_detail.label: Match detail

sport.match_score.description: Current scoreboard / period state for a match.
sport.match_score.label: Live scores

sport.prices.description: Live or last prices for selections.
sport.prices.label: Live odds

sport.rankings.description: Poll rankings (AP, coaches, committee) for a league.
sport.rankings.label: Rankings

sport.same_game_multi.description: Same Game Multi (SGM) suggestions or popular combinations.
sport.same_game_multi.label: Same game multi

sport.season_summary.description: End-of-season / current-state league summary (champion, top scorer, awards).
sport.season_summary.label: Season summary

sport.transactions.description: Roster transactions log (signings, trades, waivers, call-ups).
sport.transactions.label: Transactions

stats.advanced_metrics.description: Advanced / synergy / tracking stats not in basic box scores (PER, true shooting, xG, etc.).
stats.advanced_metrics.label: Advanced metrics

stats.ladder.description: Current ladder / standings / conference standings for a competition.
stats.ladder.label: Ladder

stats.leaders_season.description: Season leaders per stat (Coleman, Brownlow, top scorers, MVP, etc.).
stats.leaders_season.label: Leaders season

stats.play_by_play.description: Event-level play-by-play log of a game.
stats.play_by_play.label: Play by play

stats.player_career.description: Per-season totals across a player's career.
stats.player_career.label: Player career

stats.player_game_log.description: Game-by-game stat line for one player across a date range or season.
stats.player_game_log.label: Player game log

stats.player_match.description: Per-player stats for a single match / game / fixture.
stats.player_match.label: Player match

stats.player_profile.description: Biographical + career-summary view of one player (height, weight, debut, draft).
stats.player_profile.label: Player profile

stats.shot_chart.description: Shot location / spatial data (basketball, soccer, hockey).
stats.shot_chart.label: Shot chart

stats.team_game_log.description: Game-by-game results / form for one team.
stats.team_game_log.label: Team game log

stats.team_match.description: Per-team aggregate stats for a single match.
stats.team_match.label: Team match

stats.team_season.description: Per-team aggregate stats over a season.
stats.team_season.label: Team season
